data.name: ViewPageLaunchGameFixLowFovSceneTeachingTipSubtitle
data.value: After "Adjust Vision" is enabled, the fog display in all scenes will follow the status of the "Remove Fog" switch. If "Special Interface Correction" is enabled at the same time, fog rendering will be forcibly disabled when the original field of view is less than or equal to 30. This will allow you to see the normal wish/journey/character interface, but it will also force the fog to be disabled when entering some plots. This is not a software BUG, ​​please do not report it to us.

data.name: ViewPageLaunchGameInjectionDisclaimerContent
data.value:
After turning on the plug-in function, ky3 Launcher will load the message module (DLL plug-in) into the Genshin Impact game process to achieve the following functions:
· Vision adjustment/removal of fog · Frame rate unlock/disable vertical sync · Disable character fade/remove Q animation playback · Hide map card / Hide menu UID / Hide in-game UID · Portable synthesis station / can synthesize redirection ·Remove team configuration progress bar/remove combat damage numbers · Expedition shortcut keys / cooking shortcut keys / forging shortcut keys ·Mobile mode/reload configuration hotkey
Risk warning: 1. The above functions are implemented by modifying the memory when the game is running, which is an act of third-party intervention. 2. Using these functions violates the "Genshin Impact" User Service Agreement and may result in the account being permanently banned. 3. The plug-in loading operation may cause game crashes, data anomalies, or conflicts with the anti-cheat system. 4. The developer does not assume any responsibility for any consequences (including but not limited to account ban and data loss) caused by the use of plug-in functions. 5. Your use of these features is entirely at your own risk.
If you fully understand the above risks and use it voluntarily, please manually enter the following text below:

data.name: ViewPageLaunchGameInjectionErrorContent
data.value: The confirmation text you entered is inconsistent with the requirements, and the plug-in function is not enabled.

data.name: ViewPageLaunchGameHdrUnavailableContent
data.value: The current monitor does not support HDR and cannot be turned on.

data.name: ViewGuideTitle
data.value: ky3 Launcher User Agreement and Privacy Policy

data.name: ViewGuideWarning
data.value: Important note: Please be sure to read all the following contents carefully (especially the terms regarding disclaimers, risk warnings and jurisdiction). To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, by using the Software, you fully understand, agree and voluntarily assume all the obligations of this Agreement. The advanced functions such as plug-in loading contained in this software clearly violate the official user agreement of the game, and there is an absolute risk of causing the game account to be permanently banned. If you do not agree to any content of this agreement, please stop using it immediately and completely uninstall the software.

data.name: ViewGuideFooter
data.value:
Last updated: 2026
Clicking the checkbox below indicates that you have carefully read and fully understood all the disclaimers and risk clauses in this agreement, and voluntarily bear all the consequences of using this software. Thank you for your support and trust in this project, and I wish you a happy journey in Teyvat Continent!

data.name: ViewGuide1_1Text1
data.value: ky3 Launcher (hereinafter referred to as "the software") is a Genshin Impact third-party auxiliary tool developed based on the Snap Hutao open source project. This software is released under the MIT open source license agreement and aims to provide Genshin Impact players with optimized experience, body sensing, and other convenient functions.

data.name: ViewGuide1_1Text2
data.value: The original project of this software, Snap Hutao (now out of maintenance), was developed and maintained by DGP Studio. Launcher is based on its open source code for function customization, interface optimization and continuous updates.

data.name: ViewGuide1_2Text
data.value: Under the MIT Open Source License, you are free to use, copy, modify and distribute this software, subject to the following conditions:

data.name: ViewGuide1_2Bullet1
data.value: Retain the original copyright notice and MIT License text in all copies or significant portions.

data.name: ViewGuide1_2Bullet2
data.value: Clearly mark your modifications in redistributions or modified versions and do not pass them off as the original project.

data.name: ViewGuide1_2Bullet3
data.value: THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.

data.name: ViewGuide1_3Text
data.value: You should strictly abide by the following restrictions when using this software:

data.name: ViewGuide1_3Bullet1
data.value: This software may not be used for any purpose that violates the laws and regulations of your country or region.

data.name: ViewGuide1_3Bullet2
data.value: This software may not be used for any form of game cheating, plug-in production, dissemination or illegal profit-making.

data.name: ViewGuide1_3Bullet3
data.value: The Software may not be decompiled, disassembled or reverse engineered (except to the extent expressly permitted by law and not excluded by agreement).

data.name: ViewGuide1_3Bullet4
data.value: You may not delete or alter the copyright notice, license notice or other rights markings in this software.

data.name: ViewGuide2Text
data.value: This software provides the following core functions. All functions are run locally and data is obtained by calling the official public interface of the game:

data.name: ViewGuide2_1Bullet1
data.value: Support custom game launch parameters (resolution, window mode, HDR, add-on selection, etc.).

data.name: ViewGuide2_1Bullet2
data.value: Supports multi-account management and quick switching, and login credentials are stored in the local SQLite database.

data.name: ViewGuide2_1Bullet3
data.value: Supports FPS unlocking function and modifies game frame rate limit through plug-in loading technology.

data.name: ViewGuide2_1Bullet4
data.value: Support for Island in-game enhancements (including frame rate unlocking, in-game assistance, and more).

data.name: ViewGuide2_2Bullet1
data.value: Obtain the wish record query address by reading the game log file.

data.name: ViewGuide2_2Bullet2
data.value: Use your account credentials to directly access miHoYo's official API to pull wish data.

data.name: ViewGuide2_2Bullet3
data.value: Perform local statistical analysis of data, including drop rates, pity counts, historical records, etc.

data.name: ViewGuide2_2Bullet4
data.value: Supports data import and export in UIGF standard format to facilitate interoperability with other tools.

data.name: ViewGuide2_3Bullet1
data.value: Locally record and track your game achievement completion progress.

data.name: ViewGuide2_3Bullet2
data.value: Supports archiving and management of achievement data.

data.name: ViewGuide2_3Bullet3
data.value: All achievement data is only stored in the local database.

data.name: ViewGuide2_4Title
data.value: [2.4 Deep Spiral and Fantasy Reality Drama Poetry Record]

data.name: ViewGuide2_4Bullet1
data.value: Capture and record your Deep Spiral challenge data.

data.name: ViewGuide2_4Bullet2
data.value: Capture and record your Fantasy Versus Challenge data.

data.name: ViewGuide2_4Bullet3
data.value: All logging data is stored in a local SQLite database.

data.name: ViewGuide2_5Bullet1
data.value: Get your character showcase data through the Enka.Network third-party API.

data.name: ViewGuide2_5Bullet2
data.value: Display detailed information such as character equipment, holy relics, attributes, etc.

data.name: ViewGuide2_5Bullet3
data.value: This functionality relies on the availability of the third-party service Enka.Network.

data.name: ViewGuide2_6Bullet1
data.value: Query your real-time game data through miHoYo official API.

data.name: ViewGuide2_6Bullet2
data.value: Includes Resin recovery, Daily Commissions, Expeditions and other information.

data.name: ViewGuide2_6Bullet3
data.value: Your account cookie authorization is required.

data.name: ViewGuide2_7Bullet1
data.value: The plug-in option function included in this software is implemented by loading a dynamic link library (DLL plug-in) into the game process.

data.name: ViewGuide2_7Bullet2
data.value: The plug-in loading process communicates with the game process through shared memory and transfers configuration parameters.

data.name: ViewGuide2_7Bullet3
data.value: This feature may be falsely reported by some security software, but it does not contain any malicious code.

data.name: ViewGuide3Title
data.value: Chapter 3 Intellectual Property and Open Source Statement

data.name: ViewGuide3_1Bullet1
data.value: The original code copyright of this software belongs to DGP Studio and is open source under the MIT license.

data.name: ViewGuide3_1Bullet2
data.value: Launcher has corresponding rights to the secondary development code and also follows the MIT license agreement.

data.name: ViewGuide3_1Bullet3
data.value: The copyright of the game materials (character pictures, weapon icons, etc.) used in this software belongs to Shanghai MiHoYo Network Technology Co., Ltd. (miHoYo / HoYoverse).

data.name: ViewGuide3_2Text
data.value: This software is released based on the MIT License. The complete license text is as follows:

data.name: ViewGuide3_3Bullet1
data.value: "Genshin Impact" is a legally registered trademark of Shanghai MiHoYo Network Technology Co., Ltd.

data.name: ViewGuide3_3Bullet2
data.value: "Snap Hutao" is the project name of DGP Studio.

data.name: ViewGuide3_3Bullet3
data.value: The name of this software "ky3 Launcher" is only used to identify this secondary development project and does not constitute an infringement of any official trademark.

data.name: ViewGuide3_3Bullet4
data.value: All interface designs and copywriting layouts of this software, if they involve official game elements, fall within the scope of fair use by MiHoYo. This software does not claim any commercial or exclusive rights over them.

data.name: ViewGuide4Title
data.value: Chapter 4 User Data and Privacy Policy

data.name: ViewGuide4Text
data.value: We are well aware of the importance of user data security, and hereby detail the data processing methods and privacy protection measures of this software.

data.name: ViewGuide4_1Bullet1
data.value: Localization by default: Unless you actively turn on and authorize the use of online value-added services such as cloud synchronization (see Section 4.5 for details), all your basic user data will only be stored in your local device and will not be secretly uploaded to any server.

data.name: ViewGuide4_1Bullet2
data.value: Data location: stored in the %LOCALAPPDATA%\ky3 Launcher directory by default. You can customize the data folder location in the settings.

data.name: ViewGuide4_1Bullet3
data.value: Data format: The data is stored using a SQLite database and JSON files, both in standard open formats that can be viewed using any compatible tool.

data.name: ViewGuide4_1Bullet4
data.value: Encrypted storage: Sensitive information such as account cookies is encrypted and stored using Windows Data Protection API (DPAPI) to ensure that only the current Windows user account can decrypt and access it.

data.name: ViewGuide4_2Bullet1
data.value: This software does not contain any commercial advertising SDK, malicious user behavior tracking components or hidden data burrowing code.

data.name: ViewGuide4_2Bullet2
data.value: Except for the online functions you actively use (such as data synchronization), this software will not actively upload your game account, password, cookies or personal data to any developer server.

data.name: ViewGuide4_2Bullet3
data.value: When using online functions, only the minimum amount of data necessary to provide this function is transmitted.

data.name: ViewGuide4_3Text
data.value: This software may conduct the following network communications during operation, all communications are necessary to realize software functions:

data.name: ViewGuide4_3Bullet1
data.value: MiHoYo official API: Use your account credentials (Cookie) to directly access MiHoYo official server to obtain game data (wish records, real-time notes, abyss data, etc.).

data.name: ViewGuide4_3Bullet2
data.value: Enka.Network API: Visit enka.network to obtain character showcase data. You only need to provide the game UID (non-sensitive information) to query.

data.name: ViewGuide4_3Bullet3
data.value: GitHub: Visit GitHub to check whether a new version of the software is available. This process only transmits basic handshake information such as version numbers.

data.name: ViewGuide4_3Bullet4
data.value: Static resource CDN: Download static resource images such as game characters and weapons from the developer server or object storage OSS when used for the first time.

data.name: ViewGuide4_3Bullet5
data.value: Developer server: This software may communicate with the server operated by the developer to provide online value-added functions such as data synchronization and showcase agency.

data.name: ViewGuide4_4Text
data.value: This software integrates the Sentry crash reporting service to collect anonymous application crash information and performance data to help developers improve software quality.

data.name: ViewGuide4_4Bullet1
data.value: The information collected includes: software version number, operating system version, crash stack information, performance indicators and other purely technical data.

data.name: ViewGuide4_4Bullet2
data.value: It is strictly prohibited to collect: your game account, cookies, real name, physical location or any other sensitive data that can directly identify you.

data.name: ViewGuide4_4Bullet3
data.value: The software provides an explicit on/off option for crash reporting on first launch or in the settings menu, and you are free to decide whether to participate.

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Text1
data.value: This software may be connected to a back-end server operated by the developer to provide the following value-added functions:

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Bullet1
data.value: Data synchronization and cloud backup: With your explicit authorization, data such as wish records will be synchronized to the developer server for easy use across devices.

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Bullet2
data.value: Enka showcase proxy: Proxies Enka.Network requests through the developer server to improve access stability and speed.

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Bullet3
data.value: Other online functions: As the software version is updated, more functions that require server support may be added.

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Text2
data.value: When using the above functions, the developer promises:

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Promise1
data.value: Only collect the minimum data necessary to provide services, and take reasonable technical measures to ensure transmission and storage security.

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Promise2
data.value: Never sell, share or illegally provide any of your data to unrelated third parties.

data.name: ViewGuide4_5Promise3
data.value: You can choose not to use features that require a server connection at any time, and the core local functionality of the software will not be affected in any way.

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Title
data.value: [4.6 Third-party services and cross-border data flows]

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Text
data.value: This software may use the following third-party services, which have their own independent privacy policies and whose servers may be located outside your country or region:

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Bullet1
data.value: miHoYo official API: subject to miHoYo User Agreement and Privacy Policy.

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Bullet2
data.value: GitHub: Subject to the GitHub Privacy Policy, for software update checks and version downloads.

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Bullet3
data.value: Enka.Network: Subject to its separate privacy policy, used for character showcase data queries.

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Bullet4
data.value: Developer server: used to download static resources (character pictures, weapon icons, etc.).

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Bullet5
data.value: Sentry: Subject to the Sentry Privacy Policy, for anonymous crash reporting.

data.name: ViewGuide4_6Bullet6
data.value: By using functions involving third-party interfaces (such as Enka showcase, GitHub update, Sentry error reporting), you are deemed to be aware and agree that relevant non-sensitive data may be legally transferred across borders.

data.name: ViewGuide4_7Bullet1
data.value: Regular backup: It is highly recommended that you back up your data folders regularly to prevent unexpected data loss due to unforeseen hardware failure.

data.name: ViewGuide4_7Bullet2
data.value: Keep it safe: Please keep your data folder strictly confidential. It contains encrypted credentials that can directly log in to your account. Do not share it with others.

data.name: ViewGuide4_7Bullet3
data.value: System security: It is recommended to keep the operating system and security software updated to prevent Trojans or malware from stealing your local data.

data.name: ViewGuide4_7Bullet4
data.value: Official channels: Please be sure to only download this software from the official GitHub repository or recognized trusted sources, and refuse to use modified versions from unknown sources.

data.name: ViewGuide4_8Bullet1
data.value: Full Control: You have 100% control and ownership of all data stored locally.

data.name: ViewGuide4_8Bullet2
data.value: Delete at any time: You can delete the data folder or uninstall the software at any time without worrying about residual data in the cloud that cannot be cleared.

data.name: ViewGuide4_8Bullet3
data.value: Data export: All data is stored in a standard format, and you can export, backup and migrate freely.

data.name: ViewGuide4_8Bullet4
data.value: Data portability: Prayer records support UIGF standard format export and can be seamlessly migrated to other tools compatible with this standard.

data.name: ViewGuide5Title
data.value: Chapter 5 Disclaimer and Risk Warning (Must Read)

data.name: ViewGuide5_1Bullet1
data.value: This software is a completely independent third-party auxiliary experience tool and does not have any form of association, cooperation or official authorization with Shanghai MiHoYo Network Technology Co., Ltd. (miHoYo/HoYoverse).

data.name: ViewGuide5_1Bullet2
data.value: This software does not represent or imply official approval, endorsement or recommendation of any game.

data.name: ViewGuide5_1Bullet3
data.value: Neither the game official nor the developer of this software assumes any responsibility for any loss of in-game assets or collateral consequences caused by the use of this software.

data.name: ViewGuide5_2Bullet1
data.value: Although most functions of this software legally obtain data through the official public interface, according to the game's official policy, the use of any third-party tools may involve the risk of violation.

data.name: ViewGuide5_2Bullet2
data.value: The developer has absolutely no guarantee that using this software will not cause your game account to be warned, restricted from logging in, or permanently banned.

data.name: ViewGuide5_2Bullet3
data.value: You should use your own judgment to evaluate the risks of using this software and you are 100% solely responsible for all consequences of your use.

data.name: ViewGuide5_2Bullet4
data.value: In the event of account ban or other punishment events, the developer will not assume any form of appeal assistance obligation, nor will it provide any financial compensation or compensation.

data.name: ViewGuide5_3Bullet1
data.value: Functions such as FPS unlocking and Island are implemented through plug-in loading technology. Such technology clearly violates the official "User Agreement" of the game and the operating rules of anti-cheating systems (such as mhyprot).

data.name: ViewGuide5_3Bullet2
data.value: Turning on and using such functions means that you "knowingly" actively violate the game's official terms of service.

data.name: ViewGuide5_3Bullet3
data.value: This function may be accurately detected by the game's anti-cheating mechanism at any time, and the risk of account penalties resulting therefrom is entirely borne by you.

data.name: ViewGuide5_3Bullet4
data.value: This function is easily recognized as a malicious threat and intercepted by Windows Defender or other anti-virus software. This is a normal phenomenon at the technical level and does not mean that the software contains viruses.

data.name: ViewGuide5_4Text
data.value: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the Software is provided "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" and the Developer expressly disclaims all warranties of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to:

data.name: ViewGuide5_4Bullet1
data.value: IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, RELIABILITY AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

data.name: ViewGuide5_4Bullet2
data.value: A warranty that the Software will be error-free, operate without interruption, or will absolutely meet your specific expectations.

data.name: ViewGuide5_4Bullet3
data.value: Compensation for any direct, indirect, incidental, special or punitive damages (including but not limited to equipment damage, data loss, loss of profits) resulting from the downloading, installation, and use of this software.

data.name: ViewGuide5_5Title
data.value: [5.5 Disclaimer of data loss and service abnormality]

data.name: ViewGuide5_5Text
data.value: Although this software strives to ensure data integrity and functionality, to the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, the developer is not responsible for any losses caused by:

data.name: ViewGuide5_5Bullet1
data.value: Irreversible loss of data caused by user misuse (such as accidental deletion, incorrect formatting).

data.name: ViewGuide5_5Bullet2
data.value: Data corruption caused by operating system crashes, physical damage to the hard drive, or third-party malware attacks.

data.name: ViewGuide5_5Bullet3
data.value: Permanent or temporary failure of data capture caused by changes in the game's official API and forced upgrades to the interface encryption mechanism.

data.name: ViewGuide5_5Bullet4
data.value: Functional abnormalities caused by third-party services (such as Enka.Network current limit and downtime).

data.name: ViewGuide5_5Bullet5
data.value: The developer does not assume any obligation to forcefully repair problems caused by the above-mentioned third-party factors.

data.name: ViewGuide6_1Bullet1
data.value: You should ensure that your downloading and use of this software fully complies with all current laws and regulations in your country or region.

data.name: ViewGuide6_1Bullet2
data.value: It is strictly prohibited to use this software to engage in any illegal activities such as fraud, infringement, damage to computer information systems, etc.

data.name: ViewGuide6_1Bullet3
data.value: The advanced functions of this software may not be used to maliciously interfere with the normal operation of the game server or undermine the fairness of the game.

data.name: ViewGuide6_2Bullet1
data.value: For profit-making purposes, this software is packaged, resold, or commercially distributed as part of a paid plug-in.

data.name: ViewGuide6_2Bullet2
data.value: Maliciously tamper with the open source code of this software, implant computer viruses, advertising backdoors or Trojan programs and then spread them to the public.

data.name: ViewGuide6_2Bullet3
data.value: Pretend to use the official name or developer identity of the software to establish a false community for phishing or fraud.

data.name: ViewGuide6_2Bullet4
data.value: Use the account memory function of this software to engage in black industry chain activities such as illegal account theft and underground trading of game accounts.

data.name: ViewGuide6_2Bullet5
data.value: Use tool scripts to automate and make high-frequency malicious requests to API interfaces, causing substantial attacks (such as DDoS) to official game or third-party servers.

data.name: ViewGuide6_3Title
data.value: [6.3 Statement on Special Protection of Minors]

data.name: ViewGuide6_3Bullet1
data.value: If you are a minor under the age of 18 (or the legal age of majority in your area), please be sure to carefully read and agree to this Agreement with the company and guidance of your parents or other legal guardians.

data.name: ViewGuide6_3Bullet2
data.value: The use of this software by minors may lead to risks of game addiction or account violations, and guardians should strengthen supervision and guidance.

data.name: ViewGuide6_3Bullet3
data.value: All adverse consequences and legal responsibilities caused by minors using this software due to the guardian's failure to fulfill their guardianship obligations shall be fully borne by the legal guardian.

data.name: ViewGuide7_1Title
data.value: [7.1 Effectiveness and update of the agreement]

data.name: ViewGuide7_1Bullet1
data.value: The developer reserves the right to modify this agreement at any time when necessary, and the latest modified agreement will take effect when it is released with the new version of the software.

data.name: ViewGuide7_1Bullet2
data.value: Your continued operation or use of this software after the agreement is updated shall be deemed to be your unconditional acceptance and agreement to all the revised terms.

data.name: ViewGuide7_1Bullet3
data.value: If you refuse to accept the updated terms, your only remedy is to immediately uninstall the software and clear related data.

data.name: ViewGuide7_2Bullet1
data.value: If any provision of this Agreement is determined to be partially or completely invalid, illegal or unenforceable by a court or agency with competent jurisdiction, that provision will be deemed to be independently severed from this Agreement.

data.name: ViewGuide7_2Bullet2
data.value: The elimination of the above invalid provisions will in no way affect the full legal validity and enforceability of all remaining provisions of this agreement.

data.name: ViewGuide7_3Bullet1
data.value: The establishment, effectiveness, performance, interpretation and dispute resolution of this Agreement shall strictly be governed by the laws of the Mainland China (excluding the application of conflict of laws).

data.name: ViewGuide7_3Bullet2
data.value: For any disputes or controversies arising from this Agreement or the use of this Software, both parties shall first conduct friendly negotiations based on the principle of good faith.

data.name: ViewGuide7_3Bullet3
data.value: If negotiation fails, either party must file a lawsuit with the people's court with jurisdiction [where the core developer of this software or the main project maintenance team is located], excluding the jurisdiction of any other court.

data.name: ViewGuide7_4Text
data.value: This Agreement and the accompanying Privacy Policy constitute the sole, complete and final agreement between you and the Developer regarding the use of the Software, and automatically supersede any previous oral, written or electronic representations and understandings between the parties in this regard.
